body: This PR removes the GPU from the init step of our buildkite CI. This will reduce queue time but increase runtime slightly. Given the long queue times we are experiencing, this should reduce overall CI times.
title: Don't request GPU for CI init step

body: This PR adds default DTs to the callbacks and removes some repeated code in a function `scheduled_callback`.
title: Add default callback dts

body:
Closes #4122 

- Adds new documentation pages for new users: Installation, Your First Simulation, Script vs Config Interface
- Improve landing page
- Don't request gpu for init step
- See doc preview at https://clima.github.io/ClimaAtmos.jl/previews/PR4384/
title: Improve new user docs
